title: Wholesome Saudi Lettuce Salad
description: A winey, aerated lentil salad bursting with little gem lettuce, a fragrant bhuna spice rub, and a light citrus dressing perfect for a sick‑day boost.
instructions: Rinse the lentils and cook them in salted water until tender, about 15 minutes, then drain and cool.
Toast the chickpeas in a dry pan until golden and sprinkle with a pinch of sea salt.
In a small bowl whisk the lemon juice, olive oil, cumin, coriander, smoked paprika, and a splash of white wine vinegar.
Toss the cooled lentils, chickpeas, and diced red onion in the dressing until evenly coated.
Sprinkle the bhuna spice blend over the mixture and gently stir to distribute the aroma.
Arrange the little gem lettuce on a platter and spoon the lentil mixture over the greens.
Drizzle a thin stream of dressing over the top and lightly pat the lettuce.
Serve chilled or at room temperature, garnished with a dusting of sea salt.
